query: UPDATE users SET hasCompletedRegistration = 0, firstName = NULL, lastName = NULL, investmentGoal = NULL, riskTolerance = NULL WHERE email LIKE '%@manus.im%' OR openId IN (SELECT openId FROM users ORDER BY lastSignedIn DESC LIMIT 1);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute UPDATE users SET hasCompletedRegistration = 0, firstName = NULL, lastName = NULL, investmentGoal = NULL, riskTolerance = NULL WHERE email LIKE '%@manus.im%' OR openId IN (SELECT openId FROM users ORDER BY lastSignedIn DESC LIMIT 1);
